summary: Frontend testing completed for 'The Becoming' website - verifying new sections and content additions. All requested features verified and working correctly.

TEST 2: About section has updated text 'human experience where being ends and becoming begins'

TEST 7: All 6 'What It Isn't' items found (data-testid: what-it-isnt-0 through what-it-isnt-5)

TEST 12: 'Maybe YOU' section present in Journey

TEST 14: 'How It Began' heading found

TEST 18: Section order verified in code - Hero > About > Experience > What It Is/Isn't > Journey > Accommodation > Founder Story > CTA > FAQ > Contact > Footer
TEST 19: 'Creators & Freelancers' audience verified
TEST 20: Mobile responsiveness - 'What It Is/Isn't' section visible
TEST 21: Mobile responsiveness - Founder Story section visible
